title: nuphar lutea var. minor
intro: Nuphar lutea var. minor, also known as the small yellow water lily or small fragrant water lily, is a variety of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nymphaea family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nuphar lutea var. minor include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Nuphar lutea var. minor can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
